d.t: Quán cà phê: Gợi ý thêm đồ uống

e.p: Would you like a slice of cake with your coffee?
e.m: 1) Nói có hoặc không bạn muốn bánh. 2) Nói kích thước cà phê bạn muốn (small/medium/large).
e.h: Use 'I want' or 'No, thank you.' + size word.
e.s: Yes, I want a chocolate cake. I want a medium coffee.

e.p: We also have a larger coffee for $1 more. Do you want it?
e.m: 1) Nói có hoặc không bạn muốn nâng cấp. 2) Nếu có, nói 'large'. Nếu không, nói 'regular'.
e.h: Use 'Yes, I want...' or 'No, I want...'.
e.s: Yes, I want the larger coffee. I want a large coffee.

e.p: Do you want whipped cream on your drink?
e.m: 1) Nói muốn hay không. 2) Nếu muốn, nói vị (vanilla/chocolate) hoặc nói 'no'.
e.h: Use 'I want' or 'No, thank you.'
e.s: No, I do not want whipped cream. I want my coffee plain.

e.p: We often sell a coffee + cake combo. Do you prefer combo?
e.m: 1) Nói thường xuyên bạn mua combo hay không (always/often/sometimes/never). 2) Nói bạn có muốn mua hôm nay không (yes/no).
e.h: Use frequency adverb + 'I buy' and 'Yes/No'.
e.s: I sometimes buy a combo. No, I do not want a combo today.

e.p: How many cakes do you want with your order?
e.m: 1) Nói số lượng bạn muốn. 2) Nói bạn also want extra napkins or not (yes/no).
e.h: Use 'There are' or 'I want' + number; use 'Yes/No'.
e.s: I want two cakes. Yes, I want extra napkins.

d.t: Tiệm bánh: Đề xuất combo bánh và nước

e.p: Would you like a drink with your pastry?
e.m: 1) Nói bạn có muốn đồ uống không. 2) Nói loại đồ uống bạn muốn (tea/juice).
e.h: Use 'I want' or 'No, thank you.' + drink word.
e.s: Yes, I want a drink. I want a cup of tea.

e.p: We have a cake box for two. Do you want it?
e.m: 1) Nói có hoặc không. 2) Nói bạn want single cake or box (single/box).
e.h: Use 'Yes/No' and 'I want a ...'.
e.s: No, I do not want the box. I want a single cake.

e.p: Would you like your pastry warmed?
e.m: 1) Nói đang muốn bánh nóng hay không. 2) Nói cảm giác bạn (hot/cold/ok).
e.h: Use 'I am' + V-ing or 'No, thank you.'
e.s: Yes, I am warming the pastry please. I feel happy with warm pastry.

e.p: Do you want to add a small juice for $1?
e.m: 1) Nói bạn có muốn thêm nước ép không. 2) Nói bạn muốn orange or apple.
e.h: Use 'I want' and choice words.
e.s: Yes, I want the juice. I want orange juice.

e.p: How much is the combo with a drink?
e.m: 1) Hỏi giá combo (How much is ...?). 2) Nói bạn sẽ mua hay không (yes/no).
e.h: Use 'How much' + 'I will buy' or 'I will not buy'.
e.s: How much is the combo with a drink? I will buy it if it is cheap.

d.t: Quầy đồ ăn nhanh: Thêm topping và kích thước

e.p: Do you want cheese on your burger?
e.m: 1) Nói có hoặc không bạn muốn phô mai. 2) Nói bạn want single or double cheese.
e.h: Use 'Yes, I want...' or 'No, thank you.' + 'single/double'.
e.s: Yes, I want cheese. I want double cheese.

e.p: We can make your fries large for $0.5 more. Do you want that?
e.m: 1) Nói có hoặc không bạn nâng cấp. 2) Nói 'large' hoặc 'regular'.
e.h: Use 'Yes, I want...' or 'No, I want...'.
e.s: No, I do not want the upgrade. I want regular fries.

e.p: Would you like a drink with your meal?
e.m: 1) Nói bạn có muốn đồ uống. 2) Nói soda hoặc water.
e.h: Use 'I want' + drink choice.
e.s: Yes, I want a drink. I want water.

e.p: Would you like sauce with your meal?
e.m: 1) Nói có hoặc không. 2) Nói loại sauce (ketchup/mayo).
e.h: Use 'Yes' or 'No' and name sauce.
e.s: Yes, I want sauce. I want ketchup.

e.p: How many burgers do you want today?
e.m: 1) Nói số burger bạn muốn. 2) Nói bạn want to add fries or not (yes/no).
e.h: Use number with 'I want' and 'Yes/No'.
e.s: I want two burgers. Yes, I want fries too.

d.t: Cửa hàng quần áo: Gợi ý phụ kiện

e.p: Would you like a belt with that dress?
e.m: 1) Nói có hoặc không bạn muốn dây lưng. 2) Nói màu bạn thích (black/brown).
e.h: Use 'Yes, I want' or 'No, thank you.' + color word.
e.s: Yes, I want a belt. I want a black belt.

e.p: We also have matching shoes. Do you want to try them?
e.m: 1) Nói có hoặc không bạn muốn thử áo giày. 2) Nói size bạn cần (small/medium/large).
e.h: Use 'I want to try' or 'No' + size word.
e.s: Yes, I want to try the shoes. I need size medium.

e.p: Do you need a bag for your items?
e.m: 1) Nói bạn cần túi hay không. 2) Nếu cần, nói loại (small/big).
e.h: Use 'I need' or 'No, thanks.' + size.
e.s: I need a bag. I want a small bag.

e.p: Would you like to add a scarf for $5?
e.m: 1) Nói có hoặc không bạn muốn thêm khăn. 2) Nói màu khăn (red/blue) hoặc 'no'.
e.h: Use 'Yes, I want...' or 'No, thank you.'
e.s: No, I do not want the scarf. I want only the dress.

e.p: How many items do you buy today?
e.m: 1) Nói số món bạn mua. 2) Nói bạn often buy clothes here or not (always/often/sometimes/never).
e.h: Use 'There are' or 'I buy' + frequency adverb.
e.s: There are three items I buy today. I sometimes buy clothes here.

d.t: Rạp chiếu phim: Bán combo bắp/đồ uống

e.p: Would you like a popcorn and drink combo?
e.m: 1) Nói có hoặc không bạn muốn combo. 2) Nói small or large.
e.h: Use 'Yes/No' and size word.
e.s: Yes, I want the combo. I want a small combo.

e.p: We can add extra butter to the popcorn. Do you want it?
e.m: 1) Nói muốn hay không. 2) Nói 'yes' and 'extra' or 'no'.
e.h: Use 'Yes, I want...' or 'No, thank you.'
e.s: Yes, I want extra butter. I want extra, please.

e.p: Do you want a refill for your drink later?
e.m: 1) Nói thường bạn refill hay không (always/often/sometimes/never). 2) Nói bạn will buy refill today (yes/no).
e.h: Use frequency adverb and 'I will' or 'I will not'.
e.s: I often buy a refill. Yes, I will buy a refill today.

e.p: How many tickets do you need?
e.m: 1) Nói số vé bạn cần. 2) Nói bạn want seats together or not (yes/no).
e.h: Use number with 'I need' and 'Yes/No'.
e.s: I need two tickets. Yes, I want seats together.

e.p: Do you want a souvenir cup with your drink?
e.m: 1) Nói có hoặc không. 2) Nếu có, nói color (red/blue) or 'no'.
e.h: Use 'Yes, I want' or 'No, thank you.'
e.s: No, I do not want the souvenir cup. I want only the drink.

d.t: Cửa hàng điện thoại: Bán ốp lưng và bảo hành

e.p: Would you like a phone case with that phone?
e.m: 1) Nói có hoặc không bạn muốn ốp lưng. 2) Nói màu bạn thích (black/white).
e.h: Use 'Yes, I want...' or 'No, thank you.' + color.
e.s: Yes, I want a phone case. I want a black case.

e.p: We offer one-year extra warranty. Do you want it?
e.m: 1) Nói có hoặc không bạn muốn bảo hành. 2) Nói you often buy warranty or not (always/often/sometimes/never).
e.h: Use 'Yes/No' and frequency adverb.
e.s: No, I do not want the extra warranty. I sometimes buy warranty.

e.p: Do you want screen protection for $10?
e.m: 1) Nói bạn có muốn protect screen. 2) Nếu có, nói 'yes' and 'please'.
e.h: Use 'Yes, I want...' or 'No, thank you.'
e.s: Yes, I want screen protection. Yes, please add it.

e.p: How many accessories do you need today?
e.m: 1) Nói số phụ kiện bạn muốn. 2) Nói bạn need charger or headphones (yes/no).
e.h: Use number + 'I need' and 'Yes/No'.
e.s: I need two accessories. Yes, I need headphones.

e.p: Do you want to buy a matching case and screen protector together?
e.m: 1) Nói bạn có muốn mua chung không. 2) Nói bạn like this deal (yes/no).
e.h: Use 'I want' and 'I like' with yes/no.
e.s: Yes, I want to buy them together. Yes, I like this deal.

d.t: Siêu thị: Gợi ý mua số lượng lớn

e.p: We have a discount if you buy three bottles. Do you want three?
e.m: 1) Nói bạn có muốn ba chai không. 2) Nói you often buy in bulk or not (always/often/sometimes/never).
e.h: Use 'Yes/No' and frequency adverb.
e.s: Yes, I want three bottles. I sometimes buy in bulk.

e.p: Would you like a reusable bag for your items?
e.m: 1) Nói có hoặc không bạn muốn túi. 2) Nói màu túi (green/blue) hoặc 'no'.
e.h: Use 'I want' or 'No, thank you.' + color.
e.s: No, I do not want the bag. I have my own bag.

e.p: Do you want this fruit box for a cheaper price?
e.m: 1) Nói bạn có muốn hộp trái cây rẻ hơn không. 2) Nói bạn will buy today (yes/no).
e.h: Use 'I will buy' or 'I will not buy'.
e.s: Yes, I want the fruit box. I will buy it today.

e.p: How many packs of rice do you need?
e.m: 1) Nói số gói gạo bạn cần. 2) Nói bạn need delivery or not (yes/no).
e.h: Use number + 'I need' and 'Yes/No'.
e.s: I need four packs of rice. No, I do not need delivery.

e.p: We also sell cooking oil with a small discount. Do you want it?
e.m: 1) Nói có hoặc không. 2) Nếu có, nói quantity (one/two).
e.h: Use 'Yes, I want...' or 'No, thank you.' + number word.
e.s: Yes, I want cooking oil. I want two bottles.

d.t: Nhà hàng: Đề xuất món tráng miệng hoặc đồ uống

e.p: Would you like dessert after your meal?
e.m: 1) Nói có hoặc không bạn muốn tráng miệng. 2) Nói bạn prefer cake or ice cream.
e.h: Use 'Yes/No' and 'I prefer...'.
e.s: Yes, I want dessert. I prefer ice cream.

e.p: We can add a side salad for $2. Do you want it?
e.m: 1) Nói có hoặc không bạn muốn thêm salad. 2) Nói size salad (small/large).
e.h: Use 'Yes, I want...' or 'No, thank you.' + size.
e.s: No, I do not want the salad. I want only the main dish.

e.p: Do you want a bottle of water or a soft drink?
e.m: 1) Chọn nước hoặc đồ uống. 2) Nói bạn often drink water at restaurants or not.
e.h: Use 'I want' and frequency adverb.
e.s: I want a bottle of water. I often drink water at restaurants.

e.p: How much is the dessert menu item you want?
e.m: 1) Hỏi giá món tráng miệng (How much is ...?). 2) Nói bạn will order it or not (yes/no).
e.h: Use 'How much' and 'I will' or 'I will not'.
e.s: How much is the chocolate cake? I will order it if the price is fine.

e.p: Would you like coffee after the meal?
e.m: 1) Nói bạn có muốn cà phê hay không. 2) Nói bạn like coffee hot or iced.
e.h: Use 'I want' and 'hot/iced'.
e.s: Yes, I want coffee. I like hot coffee.

d.t: Hiệu thuốc: Bán sản phẩm bổ sung

e.p: Do you want vitamin C with your purchase?
e.m: 1) Nói có hoặc không bạn muốn vitamin. 2) Nói bạn take vitamins often or not (always/often/sometimes/never).
e.h: Use 'Yes/No' and frequency adverb.
e.s: Yes, I want vitamin C. I sometimes take vitamins.

e.p: We have a first-aid kit. Do you want one?
e.m: 1) Nói bạn có cần không. 2) Nói số lượng needed (one/two).
e.h: Use 'I need' and number word.
e.s: No, I do not need the first-aid kit. I only need medicine.

e.p: Would you like a discount if you buy two packs?
e.m: 1) Nói có hoặc không bạn muốn mua hai gói. 2) Nói bạn will buy today or not (yes/no).
e.h: Use 'Yes/No' and 'I will' or 'I will not'.
e.s: Yes, I want two packs. I will buy them today.

e.p: How many boxes of bandages do you need?
e.m: 1) Nói số hộp bạn cần. 2) Nói bạn want regular or large box.
e.h: Use number + 'I need' and size word.
e.s: I need one box of bandages. I want a regular box.

e.p: Do you want a small cooler bag for your medicines?
e.m: 1) Nói có hoặc không. 2) Nói màu bag (white/blue) hoặc 'no'.
e.h: Use 'Yes, I want' or 'No, thank you.' + color.
e.s: Yes, I want a cooler bag. I want a blue bag.

d.t: Dịch vụ spa: Đề xuất liệu trình thêm

e.p: Would you like a foot massage with your facial?
e.m: 1) Nói có hoặc không bạn muốn thêm foot massage. 2) Nói duration you want (15/30 minutes).
e.h: Use 'Yes, I want' or 'No, thank you.' + time.
e.s: Yes, I want the foot massage. I want 30 minutes.

e.p: We can add a mask for extra care. Do you want it?
e.m: 1) Nói có hoặc không. 2) Nói bạn often use masks or not (always/often/sometimes/never).
e.h: Use 'Yes/No' and frequency adverb.
e.s: No, I do not want the mask. I sometimes use masks at home.

e.p: Do you want to upgrade to a deluxe package?
e.m: 1) Nói bạn có muốn nâng cấp không. 2) Nói bạn will pay more or not (yes/no).
e.h: Use 'Yes, I want' or 'No, thank you.' and 'I will pay'.
e.s: Yes, I want the upgrade. I will pay more.

e.p: How many sessions do you want this month?
e.m: 1) Nói số buổi bạn muốn. 2) Nói you usually come weekly or not (yes/no).
e.h: Use number with 'I want' and 'Yes/No'.
e.s: I want two sessions this month. Yes, I usually come weekly.

e.p: Would you like a gift voucher for a friend?
e.m: 1) Nói có hoặc không. 2) Nếu có, nói recipient is male or female (male/female).
e.h: Use 'Yes, I want' or 'No, thank you.' + male/female.
e.s: Yes, I want a gift voucher. The recipient is female.

d.t: Gara rửa xe: Bán gói wax và chăm sóc

e.p: Would you like a wax with the car wash?
e.m: 1) Nói có hoặc không bạn muốn wax. 2) Nói bạn want basic or premium wax.
e.h: Use 'Yes, I want' or 'No, thank you.' + 'basic/premium'.
e.s: Yes, I want a wax. I want premium wax.

e.p: We also clean the interior for $5. Do you want it?
e.m: 1) Nói có hoặc không. 2) Nói you often clean interior or not (always/often/sometimes/never).
e.h: Use 'Yes/No' and frequency adverb.
e.s: No, I do not want the interior cleaning. I sometimes clean it myself.

e.p: Do you want tire shine after the wash?
e.m: 1) Nói có hoặc không. 2) Nói bạn want one or two tires treated (one/two/all).
e.h: Use 'Yes, I want' or 'No' and number word.
e.s: Yes, I want tire shine. I want all tires treated.

e.p: How many cars are you bringing today?
e.m: 1) Nói số xe bạn mang. 2) Nói bạn will wait or come back later (I will wait/I will come back).
e.h: Use number with 'I am bringing' and 'I will...'.
e.s: I am bringing one car today. I will wait for the service.

e.p: Would you like a monthly wash subscription?
e.m: 1) Nói bạn có muốn đăng ký hàng tháng không. 2) Nói bạn often wash your car or not (always/often/sometimes/never).
e.h: Use 'Yes/No' and frequency adverb.
e.s: Yes, I want the monthly subscription. I often wash my car.

d.t: Cửa hàng hoa: Gợi ý gói quà và thẻ

e.p: Would you like a gift box with the bouquet?
e.m: 1) Nói có hoặc không bạn muốn hộp quà. 2) Nói màu hộp (red/white).
e.h: Use 'Yes, I want' or 'No, thank you.' + color.
e.s: Yes, I want a gift box. I want a red box.

e.p: We can add a small card. Do you want a card?
e.m: 1) Nói có hoặc không. 2) Nếu có, viết một câu ngắn trên thẻ (I love you/Happy day).
e.h: Use 'Yes, I want' and short sentence.
e.s: Yes, I want a card. The message is 'Happy day'.

e.p: Do you want delivery for the flowers?
e.m: 1) Nói có hoặc không bạn muốn giao hàng. 2) Nói morning or afternoon delivery.
e.h: Use 'I want' or 'No' and time phrase.
e.s: Yes, I want delivery. I want morning delivery.

e.p: How many bouquets do you need?
e.m: 1) Nói số bó bạn cần. 2) Nói you often buy flowers here or not (always/often/sometimes/never).
e.h: Use number with 'I need' and frequency adverb.
e.s: I need three bouquets. I sometimes buy flowers here.

e.p: Would you like to add a small chocolate with the flowers?
e.m: 1) Nói có hoặc không. 2) Nói you want milk or dark chocolate.
e.h: Use 'Yes/No' and chocolate type.
e.s: Yes, I want the chocolate. I want dark chocolate.

d.t: Mua sắm online: Gợi ý mua thêm khi thanh toán

e.p: Would you like to add a charger before checkout?
e.m: 1) Nói có hoặc không bạn muốn thêm sạc. 2) Nói color bạn muốn (white/black).
e.h: Use 'Yes, I want' or 'No, thank you.' + color.
e.s: No, I do not want the charger. I want only the phone.

e.p: We often suggest related items. Do you want suggestions?
e.m: 1) Nói bạn có muốn gợi ý không. 2) Nói bạn often buy related items or not (always/often/sometimes/never).
e.h: Use 'Yes/No' and frequency adverb.
e.s: Yes, I want suggestions. I often buy related items online.

e.p: Do you want fast shipping for $3 more?
e.m: 1) Nói có hoặc không bạn muốn giao nhanh. 2) Nói you will pay or not (I will/I will not).
e.h: Use 'Yes/No' and 'I will' or 'I will not'.
e.s: Yes, I want fast shipping. I will pay the extra $3.

e.p: How many items are in your cart now?
e.m: 1) Nói số món trong giỏ. 2) Nói bạn will add warranty or not (yes/no).
e.h: Use number with 'There are' and 'Yes/No'.
e.s: There are four items in my cart. No, I do not want warranty.

e.p: Would you like gift wrap for this order?
e.m: 1) Nói có hoặc không. 2) Nếu có, nói 'yes' and color (red/blue).
e.h: Use 'Yes, I want' or 'No, thank you.' + color.
e.s: Yes, I want gift wrap. I want red wrap.

d.t: Dịch vụ đồ điện tử: Gợi ý bảo trì và phụ kiện

e.p: Would you like a cleaning service for your laptop?
e.m: 1) Nói có hoặc không bạn muốn dịch vụ. 2) Nói bạn want quick or full cleaning.
e.h: Use 'Yes, I want' or 'No, thank you.' + quick/full.
e.s: Yes, I want the cleaning service. I want full cleaning.

e.p: We sell a mouse and keyboard set. Do you want the set?
e.m: 1) Nói có hoặc không. 2) Nói you often use these accessories or not (always/often/sometimes/never).
e.h: Use 'Yes/No' and frequency adverb.
e.s: No, I do not want the set. I sometimes use accessories.

e.p: Do you want on-site support for $10 more?
e.m: 1) Nói có hoặc không. 2) Nói you will pay extra or not (I will/I will not).
e.h: Use 'Yes/No' and 'I will' / 'I will not'.
e.s: Yes, I want on-site support. I will pay the extra $10.

e.p: How many devices do you bring for repair?
e.m: 1) Nói số thiết bị bạn mang. 2) Nói bạn need fast repair or not (yes/no).
e.h: Use number with 'I bring' and 'Yes/No'.
e.s: I bring one device for repair. Yes, I need a fast repair.

e.p: Would you like a protective case for your tablet?
e.m: 1) Nói có hoặc không. 2) Nói màu case (black/gray) hoặc 'no'.
e.h: Use 'Yes, I want' or 'No, thank you.' + color.
e.s: Yes, I want a protective case. I want a gray case.

d.t: Dịch vụ giao hàng: Gợi ý bảo hiểm đơn hàng

e.p: Do you want insurance for your package?
e.m: 1) Nói có hoặc không bạn muốn bảo hiểm. 2) Nói you often buy insurance or not (always/often/sometimes/never).
e.h: Use 'Yes/No' and frequency adverb.
e.s: Yes, I want insurance. I sometimes buy insurance.

e.p: We can deliver in the morning or afternoon. Which do you prefer?
e.m: 1) Chọn morning hoặc afternoon. 2) Nói bạn will be at home or not (yes/no).
e.h: Use 'I prefer...' and 'Yes/No'.
e.s: I prefer morning delivery. Yes, I will be at home.

e.p: Would you like contactless delivery?
e.m: 1) Nói có hoặc không. 2) Nói you often choose contactless or not.
e.h: Use 'Yes/No' and frequency adverb.
e.s: No, I do not want contactless delivery. I usually meet the driver.

e.p: How many packages do you send today?
e.m: 1) Nói số gói bạn gửi. 2) Nói you want same-day service or not (yes/no).
e.h: Use number with 'I send' and 'Yes/No'.
e.s: I send three packages today. No, I do not want same-day service.

e.p: Do you want to add a gift note to the package?
e.m: 1) Nói có hoặc không. 2) Nếu có, viết một câu ngắn trên note.
e.h: Use 'Yes, I want' and short sentence.
e.s: Yes, I want a gift note. The note says 'Happy birthday'.

d.t: Ôn tập: Đề nghị thêm ở quán và cửa hàng

e.p: Would you like to add a side item with your order?
e.m: 1) Nói có hoặc không bạn muốn món phụ. 2) Nói you want small or large side.
e.h: Use 'Yes/No' and size word.
e.s: Yes, I want the side item. I want a small side.

e.p: We also offer a combo. Do you prefer combo or single item?
e.m: 1) Chọn combo hoặc single. 2) Nói you often buy combo or not (always/often/sometimes/never).
e.h: Use 'I prefer...' and frequency adverb.
e.s: I prefer the combo. I often buy combos.

e.p: Do you want a warranty for the product?
e.m: 1) Nói có hoặc không. 2) Nói you will pay extra or not (I will/I will not).
e.h: Use 'Yes/No' and 'I will' / 'I will not'.
e.s: No, I do not want the warranty. I will not pay extra.

e.p: How many extras do you want to add?
e.m: 1) Nói số extras bạn muốn. 2) Nói bạn will use them soon or later (soon/later).
e.h: Use number with 'I want' and 'soon/later'.
e.s: I want one extra. I will use it soon.

e.p: Would you like a receipt emailed to you?
e.m: 1) Nói có hoặc không. 2) Nếu có, đưa email placeholder.
e.h: Use 'Yes, please' and write email format or placeholder.
e.s: Yes, please email the receipt. My email is [studentName]@example.com.

d.t: Ôn tập: Gợi ý phụ kiện, bảo hành và nâng cấp

e.p: Would you like accessories with your device?
e.m: 1) Nói có hoặc không bạn muốn phụ kiện. 2) Nói bạn want one or two items.
e.h: Use 'Yes/No' and number word.
e.s: Yes, I want accessories. I want two items.

e.p: We can add extra warranty for one year. Do you want it?
e.m: 1) Nói có hoặc không. 2) Nói you often buy warranty or not (always/often/sometimes/never).
e.h: Use 'Yes/No' and frequency adverb.
e.s: No, I do not want extra warranty. I sometimes buy warranty.

e.p: Do you want premium support for faster help?
e.m: 1) Nói có hoặc không. 2) Nói bạn will pay monthly or yearly (monthly/yearly).
e.h: Use 'Yes/No' and 'monthly/yearly'.
e.s: Yes, I want premium support. I will pay monthly.

e.p: How many add-ons do you choose today?
e.m: 1) Nói số add-on bạn chọn. 2) Nói bạn like bundled deals or not (yes/no).
e.h: Use number with 'I choose' and 'Yes/No'.
e.s: I choose two add-ons. Yes, I like bundled deals.

e.p: Would you like a demo for the new feature?
e.m: 1) Nói có hoặc không. 2) Nói you prefer live demo or video (live/video).
e.h: Use 'Yes/No' and 'live/video'.
e.s: Yes, I want a demo. I prefer a live demo.

d.t: Ôn tập: Đặt dịch vụ & thêm món (đa ngữ cảnh)

e.p: Would you like to add a service today?
e.m: 1) Nói có hoặc không. 2) Nói tên dịch vụ ngắn (cleaning/repair).
e.h: Use 'Yes, I want' or 'No, thank you.' + service word.
e.s: Yes, I want to add a service. I want cleaning.

e.p: We offer a discount for two services. Do you want two?
e.m: 1) Nói có hoặc không. 2) Nói you will use both services today or later (today/later).
e.h: Use 'Yes/No' and 'today/later'.
e.s: No, I do not want two services. I will use one today.

e.p: Do you want extra packaging for your gift?
e.m: 1) Nói có hoặc không. 2) Nói color or style (simple/fancy).
e.h: Use 'Yes/No' and 'simple/fancy' or color.
e.s: Yes, I want extra packaging. I want a fancy style.

e.p: How many extras do you want on your order?
e.m: 1) Nói số extras bạn muốn. 2) Nói bạn pay now or later (now/later).
e.h: Use number with 'I want' and 'now/later'.
e.s: I want one extra on my order. I will pay now.

e.p: Would you like a reminder email for your service date?
e.m: 1) Nói có hoặc không. 2) Nếu có, dùng placeholder email or say 'no'.
e.h: Use 'Yes, please' and provide email placeholder.
e.s: Yes, please send a reminder. My email is [studentName]@example.com.
